title: Coupons UI cannot create a date-bounded coupon
repro: Enter valid Start and End via datetime-local controls
actual: Browser emitted POST /api/v1/admin/coupons; HTTP 400: body/starts_at must match format date-time because datetime-local omitted timezone

title: Public product page provides no variant/term selector
repro: Observe product has 1- and 6-month active terms
actual: Only first/recommended term is assigned; no term selector is rendered
suspected: frontend/src/routes/browse/products/[slug]/+page.svelte selectedVariant/selectedTerm reactive assignments around lines 426-427 and purchasePanel

title: Coupon reservation is not idempotent across checkout draft refresh
repro: Apply QA-B1-TEST15 on a guest cart
Observe discounted draft succeeds and reservation is reserved
expected: Same session refresh reuses reservation and keeps discount
actual: Second draft returns 400 already redeemed; UI silently retries couponless, voids reservation, and reprices order at full amount
suspected: POST /api/v1/checkout/draft coupon reservation path and frontend/src/routes/checkout/+page.svelte refreshDraft error fallback around lines 1190-1210

title: Supported admin product defaults allow paid orphan orders with no subscriptions/tasks
repro: Create products in /admin-next without changing optional Max subscriptions
Activate, checkout, and send signed successful webhook
expected: Unlimited/sane default or checkout refusal; paid fulfillment creation is atomic
actual: max_subscriptions becomes 0; webhook commits in_process/payment/coupon/email while each subscription creation fails and no tasks exist
suspected: frontend/src/routes/admin-next/products/[productId=uuid]/+page.svelte max_subscriptions binding; Stripe success path in src/routes/payments.ts/payment service subscription error handling

title: Strict-rules entitlement payload omits configured rules text
expected: Modal carries distinctive configured rules including literal script rendered inert
actual: Modal displays fallback “You must follow the rules for this item”; intended XSS payload absent
suspected: GET /api/v1/orders/:order/subscriptions entitlement product_options projection and frontend dashboard rulesModal fallback

title: Accepted strict-rules item shows acknowledgment modal on every reveal
suspected: frontend/src/routes/dashboard/orders/+page.svelte revealCredentials unconditionally opens modal when strict_rules is true

title: Fulfillment detail remains stale after activation-link delivery
expected: Item changes to Delivered, count 3 of 3, Restart control appears
actual: Success banner appears but item remains Customer Ready, count 2 of 3, old link stays editable until a new page load

title: Restart activation control is unreachable after link delivery
actual: Delivered-item branch renders first and omits Restart entirely

title: Fulfillment queue labels an Own-account item as New account
repro: Create P1 with New and Own enabled
actual: Grouped queue shows New account while detail correctly shows submitted Own-account selection

title: Overview fulfillment activity omits the newly paid order
repro: Complete signed webhook for QA-B1 multi-item order
expected: Paid order appears in fulfillment/activity feed
actual: Payment activity shows it but fulfillment activity does not

title: Restarted activation item cannot complete a second cycle and becomes cross-surface inconsistent
repro: Customer confirms ready a second time
expected: Order returns to actionable fulfillment state and admin can deliver second link
actual: Order remains delivered while item is active/customer_ready; delivered-order exclusion removes the activation-link input from the actionable queue/detail
suspected: POST /api/v1/admin/subscriptions/:id/activation/restart order-status recomputation and admin-next fulfillment eligibility

title: MMU completion banner omits the next month reference
repro: Complete P1 Month 2 of 6 in MMU detail
expected: Success text references Month 3 of 6 next
actual: Success only confirms the current renewal

title: MMU diagnostic falsely flags both correctly capped QA-B1 schedules as potential overdelivery
repro: Complete exact capped cycles for QA-B1 (6,1) and (12,2)
actual: P1 flagged overdelivery by 5 months and P2 by 11 despite exact five renewal tasks and zero extra after post-term sweep
suspected: database/diagnose-mmu-anchors.js projected repeat-schedule calculation ignores completed/capped lifecycle

title: Subscription MMU drawer duplicates initial provisioning in the schedule
repro: Open P1 subscription drawer after completing months 2-6
expected: Initial delivery plus Month 2 through Month 6
actual: Schedule renders Initial delivery, a separate generic credential_provision entry, then Month 2 through Month 6

title: Payop quote service returns no quote for valid snapshot-backed QA-B1 orders
repro: Load multi-item order with three per-line snapshots and null header
Call buildPayopMethodQuotes with configured PayDo/USD live method
Repeat with legacy single-item order using header snapshot fallback
expected: Both shapes quote successfully from snapshot evidence
actual: Both returned empty quote arrays; current USD snapshot rows have no fx_rate metadata required by fee conversion

title: Old order-level confirm-delivery sends two delivery emails for a single item
repro: Create and pay a registered single-item order
expected: One legacy order delivery email and delivered order
actual: Console transport emitted both per-item '...1 month is ready' and order-level 'Your SubSlush order is delivered' to the same recipient
suspected: old PATCH order status delivered path invokes per-item delivery plus legacy orderService delivery email

title: Customer dashboard shows Pending item inside a delivered legacy order
repro: Deliver registered single-item order from old fulfillment page
Log in as customer and open dashboard
actual: Order card is Delivered while its only subscription row displays Pending; DB subscription is active
suspected: legacy order-status delivery response/customer entitlement status projection or dashboard cache
